case_title: BEATRIZ TORRES ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER (EX PARTE) GRANTING PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM;[X] THE COURT ORDERS THAT BEATRIZ TORRES IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR: SAVI DAK QUIJSNO.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF QUIJANO, XAVI DAK
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED APR-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-17-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BEATRIZ TORRES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SAVI DAK QUIJANO (SON) IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS REYNA MARTINEZ (GRANDMOTHER) AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA (#301593). DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY, CLAIM ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF SAVI DAK QUIJANO ORALLY STATED IN COURT TO CORRECT SPELLING OF HIS FIRST NAME FROM "SAVI" TO "XAVI". PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3,310.88 TO THE PLAINTIFFS. PAYMENT OF CHECK WILL BE MADE PAYABLE TO BEATRIZ TORRES (GUARDIAN OF PLAINTIFF XAVI DAK QUIJANO). DEFENDANT TO MAKE PAYMENT VIA CCSF'S CLAIM PROCESS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE APRIL 17, 2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TORRES, BEATRIZ (GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SAVI DAK QUIJANO) QUIJANO, XAVI DAK AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-25-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL BY PLANTIFF(SAVI DAK QUIJANO)**GRANTED**
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT(CCSF)**DENIED** -ZOOM APPEARANCE IS AVAILABLE. TRIAL WAS ALREADY CONTINUED BEFORE SCHEDULING CONFLICT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NICHELLE D. FLENTORY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-30-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BEATRIZ TORRES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SAVI DAK QUIJANO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. REQUEST BY ALL PARTIES TO CONTINUE THE MATTER AS PLAINTIFF NEEDS MORE TIME TO OBTAIN THE MEDICAL RECORDS. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT REGARDING REQUEST TO POSTPONE REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT**DENIED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-14-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 *FINAL CONTINUANCE*. PLAINTIFF BEATRIZ TORRES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SAVI DAK QUIJANO (SON) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TRICIA PEARSE WILLIAMS, CLAIM ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT SEEKING CONTINUANCE DUE TO ASSIGNED ADJUSTER IS ON MEDICAL LEAVE. COURT GRANTS CONTINUANCE AS *FINAL CONTINUANCE* AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PRINT OUT EVIDENCE OF MEDICAL RECORDS TO BRING TO PRESENT IN COURT ON THE NEXT COURT DATE. DEFENDANT WILL HAVE TO PRESENT AN ADJUSTER FAMILIAR WITH THE CASE AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY TORRES, BEATRIZ (GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SAVI DAK QUIJANO) QUIJANO, XAVI DAK CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR CHILD (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, BEATRIZ (GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SAVI DAK QUIJANO)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TRICIA PEARSE-WILLIAMS, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NICHELLE D. FLENTROY, CLAIM ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
